channel.title: Projects on Ken Huang
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Ken Huang

item.title: Your Screenshots Deserve Better. Introducing Backdrop.
item.author: whatacold@gmail.com (Ken Huang)
item.description:
Have you ever been there? You've just finished a brilliant piece of code, designed a slick UI, or found the perfect example for a tutorial. You take a screenshot to share your work, but when you look at it… it's just… plain.

You could share it as is, but it lacks professionalism. Or, you could spend the next 15 minutes wrestling with a heavy-duty design tool, carefully placing it on a background, adding a shadow, and rounding the corners, all for a single image.
